title: Eastern-Style Roasted Cauliflower Bowl
description: A flavorful and healthy cauliflower bowl dish inspired by the cuisines of the Eastern Mediterranean. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: cauliflower
ingredients.notes: Any shape or color will do

instructions: Rinse the cauliflower and remove the leaves and stem. Cut it into florets.
In a large bowl, whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, pepper, paprika, and cumin.
Add the cauliflower florets to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Spread the cauliflower out in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cauliflower is tender and lightly browned.
Remove from the oven and serve hot in a bowl, garnished with your choice of toppings.
